findings.title: Reflected XSS in search page
findings.evidence: Query echoed without encoding: <script>alert(1)</script>. Contact tester at qa@example.com.
findings.impact: Attackers may execute JavaScript in a user's browser.
findings.recommendation: Encode output by context and add automated tests for reflected input.

findings.title: Informational banner disclosure
findings.evidence: Server header includes sample build metadata.
findings.impact: The disclosed value has limited standalone security impact.
findings.recommendation: Remove unnecessary version details from public headers.
